steps.title: Follow Karenin's time sense
steps.content: Karenin hates change because dog time is described as circular, like clock hands following the same path every day. Even moving a chair or flowerpot disturbs his sense of time.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported changes
steps.content: Choice B claims his response worsened after the move. Choice C attributes the same circular time sense to Tomas and Tereza. Choice D invents acceleration based on surroundings. The remaining choice captures Karenin's preference for predictability and dislike of disruption. The answer is A.
